query:
UPDATE cron_jobs
        SET
            name = CASE
                WHEN $1 = '' THEN name
                ELSE NULLIF($2, '')::text
            END,
            display_name = CASE
                WHEN $3 = '' THEN display_name
                ELSE NULLIF($4, '')::text
            END,
            schedule = CASE
                WHEN $5 = '' THEN schedule
                ELSE NULLIF($6, '')::text
            END,
            prompt = CASE
                WHEN $7 = '' THEN prompt
                ELSE NULLIF($8, '')::text
            END,
            channel_id = $9,
            profile = CASE
                WHEN $10 = '' THEN profile
                ELSE NULLIF($11, '')::text
            END,
            mode = CASE
                WHEN $12 = '' THEN mode
                ELSE NULLIF($13, '')::text
            END,
            action_id = CASE
                WHEN $14 = '' THEN action_id
                ELSE NULLIF($15, '')::text
            END,
            enabled = $16,
            active = $17,
            silent = $18,
            template = CASE
                WHEN $19 = '' THEN template
                ELSE NULLIF($20, '')::text
            END,
            plan = $21,
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $22
